title: scaevola obovata
intro: Scaevola obovata, also known as the fan flower or blue fan flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Caledonia, characterized by its fan-shaped clusters of small, delicate flowers in shades of blue. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaevola obovata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Scaevola obovata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
